markdown:
#  Edit an Existing Budget View 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** : 'Admin' on the company's Admin tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the company's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under **Tool Settings** , click **Budget.**
  3. In the **Budget Views** table, click the budget view to edit.
  4. Make the desired changes, you have these options:
     * **View Name**. Change the name of the budget view.
     * **View Description**. Update the budget view description.
     * **Assign to Projects**. Click the drop-down list to change the project assignments.
  5. _Optional._ If you want to change the column configuration, see [Configure the Columns for a Budget View.](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/project-equipment-user-guide/assign-the-budget-view-to-a-procore-project)
  6. Click **Done** to save changes and return to the Budget Views page.


## See Also
  * [Add the Columns for the 'Budget Changes' Feature to a Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/add-the-columns-for-the-budget-changes-feature-to-a-budget-view)
  * [Set up a New Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/set-up-a-new-budget-view)
  * [Add the Columns for Job Cost Transaction Syncing to a Budget View for ERP Integrations](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/add-the-columns-for-job-cost-transactions-syncing-to-a-budget-view-for-erp-integrations)
title: Edit an Existing Budget View
description: How to edit an existing budget view
